name: aurora-ai-message
title: Aurora AI Message
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native message parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI Message.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-components`, and `aurora-avatar` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/message.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-components`, `aurora-avatar`.
